incidentTemplates.title: Multi-Vector Phishing and Malware Campaign
incidentTemplates.executive_summary: A coordinated phishing campaign targeting financial services users has been detected. The campaign combines email spoofing, malicious URLs, and exploitation of known vulnerabilities.

url_threat.explanation: Known phishing infrastructure used in previous campaigns

recommended_actions: Immediately isolate affected systems from the network
Block the malicious URL at the firewall and email gateway
Scan all systems for indicators of compromise
Review email logs for similar phishing attempts
Notify all users to be vigilant for similar threats
Apply security patches for identified vulnerabilities
Conduct forensic analysis on compromised systems

timeline.event: Phishing email detected with critical risk level
Vulnerability CVE-2024-1234 (CVSS: 9.8) identified in affected systems
Incident report generated and escalated to security team

incidentTemplates.title: SQL Injection Attack on Database Systems
incidentTemplates.executive_summary: A SQL injection vulnerability has been exploited in production database systems. Immediate patching and monitoring is required.
recommended_actions: Review database access logs for suspicious queries
Implement input validation on all user inputs
Enable database query logging and monitoring
Conduct security audit of database configuration

timeline.event: Vulnerability CVE-2024-5678 (CVSS: 8.6) identified in affected systems
Incident report generated and escalated to security team
